title: SaaS with trials but unstable paid conversion
prompt: Our SaaS has free trials but unstable paid conversion. The founder says a billion-dollar global TAM proves the product can reach $1 million ARR. What evidence is needed?

patterns: trial.*paid.*churn|试用.*付费.*流失|試用.*付費.*流失
CAC.*LTV|acquisition cost.*lifetime|获客成本.*生命周期|獲客成本.*生命週期

critical_failures: Uses global TAM to forecast ARR without observed acquisition, conversion, retention, and margin.
Uses LTV without defining churn, margin, and observation window.
human_rubric: Does the response distinguish activation, paid conversion, retention, and contribution?
Does it specify the next cohort or paid-behavior gate?
